name: @prune/allowance-market
description: F15 — personal tradeable allowance market. Splits a shared budget envelope into owned, visible, TRANSFERABLE per-actor allowances (Coasean) so the marginal token carries a personal opportunity cost instead of being free below a shared cap. Deterministic accounting: allocate / spend / transfer / balances, every amount caller-supplied; a spend or transfer that would overdraw is rejected, never silently allowed. No fabricated numbers, no regex, no model.
